name: Chocolate-Cinnamon Angel Cake
recipeIngredient: Or all purpose flour will do
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F and place the rack on the lowest position.
2. Sift together flour, powdered sugar, cocoa, and cinnamon three times; set aside.
3. In a large mixing bowl, beat egg whites, cream of tarter, and vanilla until soft peaks form (stiff tips curl).
4. Gradually add granulated sugar, two tablespoons at a time, beating on high speed until stiff peaks form (tips stand straight).
5. Sift about one-fourth of the flour mixture over the beaten eggs; gently fold.
6. Repeat folding in the remaining flour by fourths.
7. Pour batter into an ungreased 10-inch tube pan.
8. Bake for 40-45 minutes, or until the top springs back when lightly touched.
9. Immediately invert the cake onto a plate and cool thoroughly.
10. Loosen the sides of the cake from the pan; remove the cake.
